differential_diagnoses: Hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) secondary to occult malignancy
Primary hematologic malignancy (acute leukemia or lymphoma)
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Soluble IL-2 receptor (sCD25) and ferritin monitoring for HLH/HScore assessment
Computed tomography (CT) of the chest to characterize pulmonary nodules
ADAMTS13 activity assay to definitively exclude TTP
Consultation with Hematology-Oncology and Palliative Care
